//: Workspace path mappings for Nx, read by @nx/enforce-module-boundaries to resolve SCOPED lib imports (@my-portfolio/*) to their project so depConstraints can be enforced. Only lib entry points belong here. The app's legacy convenience aliases (components/*, store/*, images/*) live in tsconfig.json (which extends this), NOT here — they are in-app imports, not project boundaries, and mapping them here would make the rule flag every one of them. Per-lib tsconfig.json files also extend this.
